/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -march=native -mtune=native -flto=auto -fno-fat-lto-objects CMakeFiles/stress_ledis_net.dir/ledis/stress_ledis_net.cpp.o -o /home/wangmaosen/app/cpp/KVStore/bin/stress_ledis_net  /home/wangmaosen/app/cpp/KVStore/lib/libledis.a -lpthread /home/wangmaosen/app/cpp/KVStore/lib/libzero.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libluajit-5.1.so -lpthread -ldl -lyaml-cpp
